_**Agent (default)**_

Short answer: **not really**.

- `@font-face` for `"Proxima Nova"` is still defined in `styles.css`.
- But the only selector that uses it is `.numeric` in `styles.css`, and `.numeric` is **not used anywhere** in your HTML/JS.
- Main UI text uses `"Raleway"` (`body` in `styles.css`, and `embed.html` also sets `"Raleway"`).
- Also, there’s no `font/` files found in this workspace, so those `@font-face` URLs currently point to missing files anyway.

If you want, I can clean this up by removing the unused `@font-face` blocks and `.numeric` rule.
